description: A standard study/office desk featuring a spacious tabletop, a solid side panel leg, and a 3-drawer pedestal cabinet on one side.
components: Three drawer front panels with pull handles
notes: The drawer cabinet should be positioned on one side (e.g., right side) and the simple panel leg on the opposite side. Drawers should have visible fronts and small pull handles/knobs. Ensure the back modesty panel links the support structures to give the desk structural rigidity.
